# Verifies that the SMA allocator can satisfy a per-store voter_constraint
# by swapping voters between sibling stores on the same node. This exercises
# both the new set_store_attrs harness verb and the existing
# considerRebalance path that handles "voter and total replica counts are
# correct in aggregate, yet incorrect per locality" (see #90110 and the
# block comment in pkg/kv/kvserver/allocator/plan/replicate.go's
# PlanOneChange).
#
# Topology: 3 nodes × 2 stores. set_store_attrs gives each store a unique
# attribute "node{N}store{I}" (matching what roachprod sets on a real
# cluster started with --store=path=...,attrs=...). The single range starts
# with all three voters on the "first" sibling of each node (s1, s3, s5).
# The applied span config requires one voter per node, pinned to the
# "second" sibling ({+node1store2:1, +node2store2:1, +node3store2:1}). To
# converge, the allocator must perform a same-node ADD/REMOVE swap on each
# node — a single ADD on the second sibling alone would be rejected by
# pkg/kv/kvserver/replica_command.go's validateOneReplicaPerNode.
gen_cluster nodes=3 stores_per_node=2
----

set_store_attrs store=1 attrs=(node1store1)
----

set_store_attrs store=2 attrs=(node1store2)
----

set_store_attrs store=3 attrs=(node2store1)
----

set_store_attrs store=4 attrs=(node2store2)
----

set_store_attrs store=5 attrs=(node3store1)
----

set_store_attrs store=6 attrs=(node3store2)
----

gen_ranges ranges=1 repl_factor=3 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s3,s5}:1
----
{s1:*,s3,s5}:1

set_span_config
[0,10000): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3 voter_constraints={'+node1store2':1,'+node2store2':1,'+node3store2':1}
----

assertion type=conformance under=0 over=0 unavailable=0 violating=0
----

eval duration=1m cfgs=(sma-count) metrics=(replicas) full=true
----
sma-count:
replicas#1: first: [s1=2, s2=0, s3=2, s4=0, s5=2, s6=0] (stddev=1.00, mean=1.00, sum=6)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=1, s2=1, s3=1, s4=1, s5=1, s6=1] (stddev=0.00, mean=1.00, sum=6)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 9aac6ae3858a616d
==========================
Cluster Set Up
	n1(AU_EAST,AU_EAST_1,8vcpu): {s1:(256GiB),s2:(256GiB)}
	n2(AU_EAST,AU_EAST_1,8vcpu): {s3:(256GiB),s4:(256GiB)}
	n3(AU_EAST,AU_EAST_1,8vcpu): {s5:(256GiB),s6:(256GiB)}
Key Space
	[0,10000): 1(rf=3), 0MiB, [{s1*,s3,s5}:1]
Event
	set s1 attrs=[node1store1]
	set s2 attrs=[node1store2]
	set s3 attrs=[node2store1]
	set s4 attrs=[node2store2]
	set s5 attrs=[node3store1]
	set s6 attrs=[node3store2]
	[0,10000): 3voters [voters:{1:=node1store2}{1:=node2store2}{1:=node3store2}]
	set LBRebalancingMode to 2
Workload Set Up
	empty
Changed Settings
	empty
==========================
